RECIPE-BOOK.App.Title: Recipe Book
RECIPE-BOOK.App.NoneAssigned: No character has received this recipe yet.
RECIPE-BOOK.App.WindowClosedHint: The GM hasn't opened the crafting window yet.
RECIPE-BOOK.App.SelectRecipeHint: Select a recipe on the left.
RECIPE-BOOK.Editor.Title: Recipe Editor
RECIPE-BOOK.Editor.Name: Name
RECIPE-BOOK.Editor.DropHint: Drag items here from a compendium or the world.
RECIPE-BOOK.Hud.Title: Crafting Panel
RECIPE-BOOK.Dialogs.DeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this recipe? This cannot be undone.
RECIPE-BOOK.Errors.WindowClosed: The GM hasn't opened the crafting window yet.
RECIPE-BOOK.Errors.MissingSourceItem: Could not find the source item "{item}". It may have been moved or deleted.
RECIPE-BOOK.Errors.RecipeNoLongerExists: This recipe no longer exists (it may have been deleted in another window).
RECIPE-BOOK.Errors.NoCharacterMessage: Unfortunately, to use the Recipe Book you need a character. Ask your GM to create a character and assign it to you.
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.QuantityPath.Name: Item Quantity Field
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.QuantityPath.Hint: Data path your system uses to store an item's quantity, e.g. system.quantity. Adjust this if your system uses a different field.
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.ImportMenu.Name: Import Recipes
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.ImportMenu.Label: Import
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.ImportMenu.Hint: Imports recipes from a directly chosen JSON file.
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.ExportMenu.Name: Export Recipes
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.ExportMenu.Label: Export
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.ExportMenu.Hint: Generates a file with all recipes in this world, ready to import into another world or to serve as the base for a content module.
RECIPE-BOOK.Import.Title: Import Recipes
RECIPE-BOOK.Import.Description: Choose a recipes file (JSON format) to import. It can be a file someone sent you, one you exported yourself before, or one inside an installed module.
RECIPE-BOOK.Import.NoPathGiven: Enter a file path before importing.
RECIPE-BOOK.Import.NoFileFound: Could not read that file, or it isn't valid JSON.
RECIPE-BOOK.Import.Overwrite: Overwrite recipes already imported before (instead of skipping)
RECIPE-BOOK.Export.Title: Export Recipes
RECIPE-BOOK.Export.Description: Generates a file with all current recipes in this world, ready to import into another world or to serve as the base for a content module.
RECIPE-BOOK.Assignments.Title: Manage Assignments
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.DeleteAllMenu.Name: Delete All Recipes
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.DeleteAllMenu.Label: Delete All
RECIPE-BOOK.Settings.DeleteAllMenu.Hint: Permanently removes all recipes in this world.
RECIPE-BOOK.DeleteAll.Title: Delete All Recipes
RECIPE-BOOK.DeleteAll.Description: Permanently removes all recipes in this world. This cannot be undone.
RECIPE-BOOK.DeleteAll.ConfirmContent: This will permanently delete all recipes in this world. This cannot be undone.
